summary: Completed testing of ASR Enterprises Solar Admin Panel. Backend APIs: 21/22 passed (95.5%). Frontend: Admin login, Dashboard, Analytics, Social Media Hub all working. Staff Management page accessible via dashboard navigation.

minor.issue: Returns HTML instead of JSON when accessed via public URL (Kubernetes ingress routing issue)
LlmChat.__init__() missing 'session_id' and 'system_message' arguments - fallback content is used instead

action_items: Fix LlmChat initialization in server.py - add session_id and system_message parameters to LlmChat() calls
Consider increasing login rate limit for testing purposes or add test bypass
critical_code_review_comments: LlmChat class initialization is incorrect - missing required parameters session_id and system_message. Current code uses fallback content which works but AI features are not fully functional.
Login rate limiting (5 attempts/5 min) may be too aggressive for testing scenarios
seed_data_creation: Created test leads, staff members, and social posts during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login rate limit is 5 attempts per 5 minutes. If OTP verification fails with 'Too many login attempts', wait 5 minutes. Mock OTP 131993 works for admin email asrenterprisespatna@gmail.com.

admin_login_flow.details: OTP send and verify working with mock OTP 131993

admin_dashboard.details: All 9 module cards visible including Social Media Hub and Analytics

analytics_page.details: Shows leads stats, district breakdown, status breakdown, property type breakdown, recent leads table

social_media_hub.details: Connected accounts visible, AI Post Generator modal working, fallback content generated

staff_management.details: Backend APIs for staff CRUD working. UI accessible via dashboard navigation.

mocked_apis.admin_otp: OTP 131993 is hardcoded for admin login - not sent via real email
mocked_apis.ai_content_generation: LlmChat calls fail due to incorrect initialization, fallback content is used instead
